title: NATS-KV — demo + admin (DS2)
description: Akamai DS2 logs for the nats-kv property (covers both demo and admin hostnames). Populates once the Akamai property is activated and DS2 stream begins delivering.

targets.rawSql: SELECT count() FROM default.ds2_raw WHERE match(reqHost, '^${host}$') AND timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime
SELECT sum(bytes) FROM default.ds2_raw WHERE match(reqHost, '^${host}$') AND timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime
SELECT uniq(edgeIP) FROM default.ds2_raw WHERE match(reqHost, '^${host}$') AND timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime

SELECT if(count() > 0, countIf(cacheStatus IN ('1','TCP_HIT','TCP_MEM_HIT','TCP_IMS_HIT')) * 100.0 / count(), 0) FROM default.ds2_raw WHERE match(reqHost, '^${host}$') AND timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime
SELECT if(count() > 0, countIf(statusCode >= 400) * 100.0 / count(), 0) FROM default.ds2_raw WHERE match(reqHost, '^${host}$') AND timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime
SELECT avg(bytes) FROM default.ds2_raw WHERE match(reqHost, '^${host}$') AND timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime

SELECT toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL 5 MINUTE) AS time, reqHost AS metric, count() AS requests FROM default.ds2_raw WHERE match(reqHost, '^${host}$') AND match(reqHost, 'nats-kv') AND timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime GROUP BY time, reqHost ORDER BY time

SELECT toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL 5 MINUTE) AS time, multiIf(statusCode<300,'2xx',statusCode<400,'3xx',statusCode<500,'4xx','5xx') AS metric, count() AS requests FROM default.ds2_raw WHERE match(reqHost, '^${host}$') AND match(reqHost, 'nats-kv') AND timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime GROUP BY time, metric ORDER BY time

SELECT toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL 5 MINUTE) AS time, sum(bytes) AS bytes FROM default.ds2_raw WHERE match(reqHost, '^${host}$') AND match(reqHost, 'nats-kv') AND timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL 5 MINUTE) AS time, if(cacheStatus IN ('1','TCP_HIT','TCP_MEM_HIT','TCP_IMS_HIT'),'HIT','MISS') AS metric, count() AS requests FROM default.ds2_raw WHERE match(reqHost, '^${host}$') AND match(reqHost, 'nats-kv') AND timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime GROUP BY time, metric ORDER BY time

SELECT reqPath AS path, count() AS hits, sum(bytes) AS bytes, countIf(statusCode>=400) AS errors FROM default.ds2_raw WHERE match(reqHost, '^${host}$') AND match(reqHost, 'nats-kv') AND timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime GROUP BY reqPath ORDER BY hits DESC LIMIT 25

SELECT statusCode, count() AS hits, sum(bytes) AS bytes FROM default.ds2_raw WHERE match(reqHost, '^${host}$') AND match(reqHost, 'nats-kv') AND timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime GROUP BY statusCode ORDER BY hits DESC LIMIT 25

SELECT edgeIP, count() AS hits, sum(bytes) AS bytes FROM default.ds2_raw WHERE match(reqHost, '^${host}$') AND match(reqHost, 'nats-kv') AND timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime GROUP BY edgeIP ORDER BY hits DESC LIMIT 25

panels.title: Demo vs Admin split (last full window)

targets.rawSql: SELECT reqHost AS host, count() AS hits, sum(bytes) AS bytes, countIf(statusCode>=500) AS srv_errors, countIf(cacheStatus IN ('1','TCP_HIT','TCP_MEM_HIT','TCP_IMS_HIT')) AS cache_hits FROM default.ds2_raw WHERE match(reqHost, 'nats-kv') AND timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime GROUP BY reqHost ORDER BY hits DESC
